document.name: soemdsp-sandbox tooltip master
document.purpose: Edit user-facing tooltip and interaction-help text here instead of hunting through app markup or event code.

common.editText: Mouse: click to edit, drag to select text.

constraints.cpu: Show CPU-constrained controls. These can make the processor work harder; for example, Additive Osc Harmonics.
constraints.ram: Show RAM-constrained controls. These can increase memory pressure, buffers, or stored data.
constraints.gpu: Show GPU-constrained controls. These can make visual rendering or shader work heavier.

workspace.pan: Mouse: middle-drag to move the modular view freely. Ctrl+middle-drag or Alt+middle-drag slowly zooms, including over modules and controls. Right-click empty space opens the add module dialog. Ctrl+Shift+G aligns the view to the grid.
workspace.resize: Mouse: drag to resize workspace by grid units.

view.midiKeyboardDevelopment: Show or hide the mouse-playable keyboard panel.
view.zoomIn: Zoom in. Click for the next integer zoom level; Shift-click adds 0.25; Ctrl/Cmd-click adds 0.10.
view.zoomOut: Zoom out. Click for the previous integer zoom level; Shift-click subtracts 0.25; Ctrl/Cmd-click subtracts 0.10.
view.zoomReset: Current zoom: {zoom}. Click to reset graph zoom to exact 1:1. Double-click to enter a zoom number.
view.zoomHelp: Mouse: click - or + for integer zoom levels. Shift-click steps by 0.25; Ctrl/Cmd-click steps by 0.10. Click the zoom number for exact 1:1, or double-click it to type a zoom level. Wheel over the workspace to zoom freely. Ctrl+Shift+G aligns the view to the grid.
view.gridHelp: Mouse: click to show or hide the modular grid.
view.snapGrid:
Click: snap modular view pan, zoom, and edges to the grid.
Shift-click: toggle grid-snapped movement while middle-dragging the view.

history.help: Mouse: click to step patch history.

script.download: Download patch script as a JSON file
script.updateDefault: Validate current patch script and save it as the default preset
script.save: Save patch script as a JSON file

settings.uiDevOpen: Mouse: click to open or close the floating UI development helper.
settings.uiSettingsOpen: Mouse: click to open or close user UI settings.
settings.uiDevMove: Mouse: drag to move the UIDEV helper.
settings.uiSettingsMove: Mouse: drag to move the UI settings panel.
settings.makePlugin: Export the current circuit to CLAP/VST/AU/other that turns a sandbox patch into a multiplatform audio plugin. (currently unavailable)
settings.makeModule: Design a reusable DSP module from the current circuit or selected nodes. (currently unavailable)
settings.makeWidget: Build a custom UI widget/performer control for circuit interactions and visual performance. (currently unavailable)
settings.sharePatchCommunity: Share this patch with the community so other people can load, remix, and learn from it. (currently unavailable)

module.drag: Mouse: drag to move modules. Click to select. Ctrl/Shift+click adds or removes from selection; Ctrl/Shift+drag adds to selection while moving.
module.move: Mouse: drag to move modules. Click to select; Ctrl/Shift+click adds or removes from selection.
module.titleMove: Mouse: drag to move modules. Click to select; Ctrl/Shift+click adds or removes from selection. When module buttons are hidden, Alt+click the title to toggle bypass.
module.actions: Mouse: click to open module actions.
module.textBoxEdit: Display-only text. Edit content from this module's actions menu. Text clips to the box height and scales down to fit width. Mouse wheel zooms the modular view.
module.bypass: Mouse: click to bypass this module. Bypassed modules are removed from the compiled engine.
module.include: Mouse: click to include this module in the compiled engine.
module.outputOn: Mouse: click to turn live OUTPUT on.
module.outputOff: Mouse: click to turn live OUTPUT off.
module.outputToggle: Mouse: click to toggle live OUTPUT.
module.executionActive:
Compiled order: {order}
This module runs at this step in the current execution plan.
module.executionBypassed:
Compiled order: bypassed
This module is ignored by the compiled engine.
module.executionInactive:
Compiled order: inactive
This module is not reachable from Output or a visual sink.
module.executionListItem:
Compiled order {order}: {nodeName}
Selection only happens from move handles or marquee.
module.scopeWindow: Oscilloscope: drag up/down to zoom in or out by changing cycles. Drag left/right to pan the waveform. Right-click to edit this module's scope shader.

wire.selected: Mouse: click to select this wire. Delete removes selected wire.
wire.output: Plain drag between this output and a signal input or modulation input to create a wire.
wire.parameterOutput: Plain drag between this normalized 0..1 slider output and a signal input or modulation input to create a wire.
wire.input: Plain drag between this signal input and an output to create a wire. To change an existing connection, select and delete the wire, then create a new one.
wire.modulationInput: Plain drag between this modulation input and an output to create a wire. To change an existing modulation, select and delete the wire, then create a new one.

slider.numeric: Mouse: drag adjusts, Alt+click jumps, Ctrl+click resets to default, Ctrl/Shift drag fine tunes, double-click types, right-click edits metadata.
slider.choices: Mouse: click a segment to choose, Ctrl+click resets to default, Alt+click jumps, double-click types, right-click edits metadata.

audio.inputDeviceUnavailable: Browser audio input device selection unavailable.
audio.inputDeviceMissing: Browser has not exposed audio input devices yet.
audio.liveInputConnected: Live INPUT is connected to the browser audio engine.
audio.liveInputVisible: Live INPUT module is visible. Start OUTPUT to request microphone access.
audio.play: Mouse: click to play rendered sample.
audio.playBlockedRenderFirst: Play blocked: render a sample first
audio.playBlockedScript: Play blocked: fix script before render
audio.liveOutputRunningWithInput: Live OUTPUT is running with microphone INPUT connected.
audio.liveOutputPermissionPending: Live OUTPUT requested; browser microphone permission may be pending.
audio.liveOutputRequested: Live OUTPUT requested; graph may be blocked.
audio.liveOutputWithInput: Start live OUTPUT and request browser microphone permission.

actions.addModule: Mouse: click to add or show module.
actions.deleteSelection: Mouse: click to delete selected item.
actions.copyUnavailableOutput: Copy unavailable: Output module is required
actions.copyUnavailableWire: Copy unavailable: selected object is a wire
actions.deleteUnavailableOutput: Delete unavailable: Output module is required
actions.deleteWireMissing: Delete unavailable: selected wire no longer exists

wireType.cable: Cable: draw this selected wire with the current curvy cable style.
wireType.trace: Trace: draw this selected wire as a crisp up/down/left/right circuit trace.

actions.copyExecutionJson: Mouse: click to copy the full compiled execution JSON.
actions.copyRuntimeSketch: Mouse: click to copy the caller-owned C++ runtime sketch.
actions.widthDecrease: Decrease this module width by one grid unit
actions.widthIncrease: Increase this module width by one grid unit
actions.moduleAlias: Cosmetic title shown on this module. Empty uses the real module name.
actions.textBoxHeightDecrease: Decrease this text box height by one grid unit.
actions.textBoxHeightIncrease: Increase this text box height by one grid unit.
actions.textBoxTextSizeDecrease: Decrease this text box text size.
actions.textBoxTextSizeIncrease: Increase this text box text size.
actions.hideModuleButtons: Hide this module's header buttons. The actions button stays visible so this can be undone.
actions.textBoxSingleLine: Use a single-line text box layout.
actions.textBoxMultiline: Use a multiline text box layout.
actions.textBoxContent: Edit the text displayed by this text module.
actions.textBoxVerticalPosition: Set text vertical position as a percentage of unused space.

legacyEvidence.waveformPositionIdle: Waveform position 0.000s / unknown / phase unknown / Follow Audio
legacyEvidence.phaseAudioStatsUnavailable: Phase audio stats unavailable: manifest required
legacyEvidence.visualOutputRenderFirst: Render Sample before saving visual output
legacyEvidence.visualOutputWaiting: Node graph visual output waiting for Render Sample
